halva-of-farsala-argiro.name: Halva Of Farsala

instructions: First we rock the almonds. Add them to a peelless baking pan, smooth, and baking in a preheated evening at 200 °C, on the medium grill, for about 10 minutes until brightly golden. During the baking mix to make eving. We put them aside.
Keep 1 cup of sugar for caramel and 1⁄2 cup of sugar for finishing.
In a bowl, mix the remaining sugar (2.5 cup) with the nisheste.
Add the water and sunflower oil (or melted clean butter) and mix well with a seed to melt the injectors and unite.
Mix with wire 2-3 minutes until the mixture becomes smooth. At this stage we add cinnamon or vanilla, if we want.
In a deep pot, grandly add 1 cup of sugar over medium heat. Let it melt, stringing whenever needed with an oily wooden sponge.

When the sugar melts evening, add the liquid mixture careful. During the first moment, the mixture will fighten due to a temperature drop, but continuing mixing at medium fire will return to liquid form.
Stir continued until all the liquids are absorbed and the mixture is removed from the pot walls.
Remove from heat and continue mixing for a few minutes until the oil complete displays on the surface.
Add the roasted almonds and mix gently so that they go everywhere.
We use shell bearing pan (about 32–34 cm). Pour the mixture into the baking pan, shake to spread and straighten the surface. Let it cool.
Sprinkle with the rest of the sugar (1⁄2 cup) and Caramelize with a torch or baking in the grill for a few minutes, until it melts and becomes golden.
Cut into pieces after it cools well.

halva-with-tahini-argiro.name: Halva With Tahini
instructions: We choose tahini of our liking, as its kind dermines the color of the final halva. The white tahini comes from peeled, processed season, while the dark of total sesame milling with its bark.
Add the tahini to a bowl and add the vanilla.
In a pot, add the water, glucose and sugar and mix until they bowl.
Add the sour (lemon tuzou) and allow the syrup to boil until caramelize and reach 118°3. Its color will darken and the processes takes about 4 minutes.
Remove the pot from heat. To check the correct temperature without a thermometer, add a few drops of hot syrup into a plate of cold water? If we can catch them with our fingerers, then it's ready.
With a hand mixer, first at low speed, beat the caramel. Gradually it changes color, becomes white and acquired texture reminiscent of liquid vanilla submarine.
Add some caramel to the bowl with the tahini and fold with a wooden sponge while still warm. As long as the mixture remains warm, it is soft and easily worked? As it gets cold, it starts to fighten.

When the temperature drops and no longer works with the sponge, we continue the hand dough. It is ready when it becomes elastic, with a tight texture and the materials do not scatter. The diploma gradually creates characteristic fibres.
Add almonds, Aegine peels or other nuts of our choice and continue the dilemma and declaration. The more he works, the more fiber he gets.
Sprinkle with a few whole or coarsely chopped almonds or peels a small silicone form or a small bowl. Transfer the halva and press well with the hands to stick to the nuts and straighten the surface.
Allow the halva to stand on a grill, at room temperature, for 4–5 hours. Disform and cut into slides or small pieces.

hasenpfeffer-rabbit-stew.name: Hasenpfeffer (rabbit Stew)
instructions: Place bacon in a large skillet; cook and stir over medium-high heat until evenly browned, about 10 minutes.
Use a slotted spoon to transfer bacon to a paper towel-lined plate; set aside.
Sprinkle rabbit with salt and coat with flour, shaking off excess.
Cook rabbit in bacon fat in the skillet over medium heat until browned. Transfer rabbit to a plate and set aside. Drain excess grease, leaving 2 tablespoons fat in the skillet.
Sauté shallots and garlic in fat in the skillet until tender, about 4 minutes.
Add wine, water, and bouillon. Bring to a boil, then stir in jelly, peppercorns, bay leaf, and rosemary.
Return rabbit and bacon to the skillet. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low. Cover and let simmer until rabbit is tender, about 1 1/2 hours.
Remove bay leaf and discard. Place rabbit on a warm platter; cover to keep warm while preparing gravy.
Make gravy: Stir lemon juice into cooking liquid in the skillet. Mix together water and flour in a small bowl; stir mixture into the skillet over low heat and simmer until thickened. Stir in thyme.
Pour gravy over rabbit or serve in a gravy boat on the side.

hattie-bs-nashville-hot-chicken.name: Hattie B's Nashville Hot Chicken

ingredients.item: Plus 4 tsp. diamond crystal or 1 tbsp. plus 2 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: such as Tabasco or Texas Pete

instructions: Toss 2 (3½–4-lb.) chickens, each cut into 10 pieces with 1 Tbsp. freshly ground black pepper with 2 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 Tbsp. Morton kosher salt in a large bowl. Cover and chill at least 3 hours (and up to 24).

Whisk 4 large eggs, 2 cups buttermilk or whole milk, and 2 Tbsp. vinegar-based hot sauce in a large bowl. Whisk 4 cups all-purpose flour and remaining 4 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 2 tsp. Morton kosher salt in a second large bowl.

Fit a Dutch oven with thermometer; pour in vegetable oil to measure 2". Heat over medium-high heat until thermometer registers 325°. Pat chicken dry. Working with 1 piece at a time, dredge in flour mixture, shaking off excess, then dip in buttermilk mixture, letting excess drip back into bowl. Dredge again in flour mixture and place on a baking sheet lined with a wire rack.

Working in 4 batches and returning oil to 325° between batches, fry chicken, turning occasionally, until crust is deep golden brown and crisp and an instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part of pieces registers an internal temperature of 160° for white meat and 165° for dark, 15–18 minutes. Transfer to a clean wire rack set inside a baking sheet. Let oil cool slightly.

Whisk 6 Tbsp. cayenne pepper, 2 Tbsp. dark brown sugar, 1 tsp. chili powder, 1 tsp. garlic powder, and 1 tsp. paprika in a medium bowl; carefully whisk in 1 cup frying oil. Brush fried chicken with spicy oil. Serve with white bread and sliced pickles.
Do Ahead: Chicken can be seasoned 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.
Editor’s note: This recipe for hot chicken was first printed in our June 2014 issue. Head this way for more of our spiciest recipes →

In a bowl, we mix flour, yogurt, yeast and oil. If it gets very dry, we add a little water till we get a soft mass that doesn't stick to our hands.
Dividimos la masa en 6 u 8 porciones y les damos forma de discos de unos 8 cm.
Colocamos sobre papel vegetal y ponemos encima el tomate triturado, el queso rallado y las hojas de albahaca (si las usamos).
We baked about 12 to 15 minutes, till the cheese's broken and the base's made but soft. The air fryer can take about 10- 12 minutes.

hearty-protein-packed-chili.name: Hearty Protein-packed Chili
instructions: In a large pot over medium heat, combine the olive oil, garlic, onion, jalapeño, red bell pepper, chili powder, cayenne, cumin, black pepper, and salt. Stir well and cook until the spices are fragrant, 3–5 minutes.

Add the crushed tomatoes, vegetable broth, tomatoes, quinoa, black beans, kidney beans, tomato paste, and oregano and mix well. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium heat, cover, and simmer for 25–30 minutes.
Let the chili cool for 2 minutes, then ladle into bread bowls and serve.
Enjoy!

heirloom-tomato-salad-with-buttermilk-dr.name: Heirloom Tomato Salad With Buttermilk Dressing And Blue Cheese
instructions: Whisk first 6 ingredients in small bowl. Season dressing with coarse salt and freshly ground pepper.

Place tomatoes and shallots in large bowl. Add oil and lemon juice; sprinkle with coarse salt and freshly ground pepper and toss. Divide among 6 plates. Drizzle with dressing. Sprinkle with blue cheese, green onions, and parsley.

honey-garlic-chicken-thighs.name: Honey Garlic Chicken Thighs

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Season chicken on both sides with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a cast iron skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken and brown on one side, 3 to 5 minutes.
Flip chicken and add onion and garlic; continue to cook until chicken is mostly (but not fully) cooked and onion and garlic are soft, 5 to 7 minutes more. Remove chicken to a plate.
Add honey, soy sauce, onion powder, and garlic powder to the skillet. Stir and scrape the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon to get garlic and onion to mix with the liquid.

Return chicken to the skillet, cover, and reduce heat to medium. Cook until no longer pink in the center and juices run clear, about 10 more minutes, turning once halfway through. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of a thigh should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).
Arrange chicken on a serving plate and drizzle liquid from the pan on top. Sprinkle with cilantro to serve.
Enjoy!

how-to-cook-frozen-meatballs-in-the-air-.name: How To Cook Frozen Meatballs In The Air Fryer
instructions: Preheat the oven to 193°C (190 degrees C).
Spread out frozen meatballs in a single layer in the air fryer basket. Spray tops with cooking spray.
Cook in the air fryer for 4 minutes. Shake, and cook for an additional 4 minutes.

In a big bowl, add wheat flour, the rest of the sugar and pint of salt. That's a good mix.
Incorpora al bol la levadura activada, los huevos y la mantequilla derretida.
Mix very well for 10 minutes till you get a light and elastic mass.
Once ready, leave her in the bowl and cover with a clear cloth. Let them ferment for about an hour to double their size.
Pasado ese tiempo, amasa ligeramente para desgasificar y divide la masa en porciones de 60 a 70 gr.
Trata de darle forma de donas pero sin el agujero del centro y deja reposar por 20 minutos.
Warm a frying pan with vegetable oil.
Fry bad till they're golden. You have to turn them around to get them cooked evenly.

how-to-make-rice-balls-onigiri.name: How To Make Rice Balls (onigiri)

ingredients.item: Shiso with hijiki (dried seaweed flakes) to taste

instructions: Combine rice and water in a heavy-bottomed pot with a tight-fitting lid. Soak for 20 to 30 minutes. Cover and bring to a boil over medium heat. Once water is boiling, reduce heat to low and cook until water is completely absorbed, 12 to 13 minutes. Remove from the heat; keep covered and steam for another 10 minutes. Remove lid and cool to room temperature, about 20 minutes.

Wet your hands and form small amounts of rice into triangle shapes if possible, or round balls. Wrap each onigiri with a strip of nori. Season with salt and garnish with sesame seeds and seaweed flakes.

how-to-make-roasted-red-potatoes.name: How To Make Roasted Red Potatoes

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Pour olive oil into a heavy baking dish (such as an enameled cast iron dish). Place potatoes into the baking dish and toss to coat. Sprinkle with red bell pepper, thyme sprigs, kosher salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper.
Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes. Toss vegetables to turn over. Some potatoes may stick; don't try to turn them. Return to the oven and bake for 20 more minutes.
Toss vegetables again, turning potatoes so the unbrowned sides come into contact with the bottom of the dish. Continue baking until potatoes are browned and tender, about 15 more minutes.
Turn the oven off and leave potatoes in the oven for 15 more minutes. Toss once more. Season with salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper before transferring to a serving bowl.

how-to-make-sauteed-green-beans-with-gar.name: How To Make Sautéed Green Beans with Garlic And I

After that time withdraw from hot water and put them into a bowl with water with ice to cut the cooking.
Escurre muy bien.

Saltea por 2 minutos hasta que los ejotes queden glaseados.
Once ready, turn off, serve with sesame seeds and enjoy.

how-to-make-sweet-venezuelan-bananas-com.name: How To Make Sweet Venezuelan Bananas
instructions: It starts with this recipe by peeling the bananas and cutting them onto wheels of the same size.
In an anti-stick frying pan, at medium heat, add butter and let it completely melt.
Add the bananas and let them golden on one side, about 2 minutes, then turn them and leave them with the same time on the other.
Add sugar and water and spicy cloves. Let them cook at medium low heat for 5 minutes with the frying pan.
Once this time goes back to the bananas and if there's little water, add half an extra cup and cover again.
Remove the clavits from the frying pan and serve immediately.

how-to-prepare-brandy-chicken-thighs-com.name: How To Prepare Brandy Chicken Thighs
how-to-prepare-brandy-chicken-thighs-com.original_name: Cómo preparar muslos de pollo al brandy
instructions: It purifies the oven at 200 been 3 been.
Adoba los muslos de pollo con sal y pimienta y espolvorea la harina sobre ellos.
Warm olive oil in a large frying pan with medium-high heat.
Add the chicken thighs and cold till they are sealed throughout about 4 minutes per side.
Remove the chicken thighs from the frying pan and put them on a refractory baking plate.
En la misma bandeja, agrega la cebolla y el ajo.
Echa el brandy y mete la bandeja a hornear por 30 minutos aproximadamente.
Meanwhile melt the butter and mix with the squeezed lemon and rosemary and put this liquid onto the chicken thighs into the refractory plate after about 5 minutes to finish the cooking.
A few more minutes and you'll have your bandy chicken thighs ready.

hummingbird-pancakes-with-caramelized-pi.name: Hummingbird Pancakes With Caramelized Pineapple And Pecans
instructions: Cut the pineapple cubes—cutting with the “grain”—into ¼-inch-thick slices.

In a 12-inch nonstick skillet set over medium heat, combine the butter and maple syrup, swirling the pan as the butter melts. When the mixture begins to bubble and foam, add the pineapple and cook over medium-high heat, tossing occasionally, until lightly caramelized, 4 to 6 minutes.

Reduce the heat to medium, add the pecans and salt and cook, tossing often, until the nuts are toasted, 2 to 3 more minutes. Transfer the mixture to a bowl and set aside. Rinse out the skillet and return it to the stove.

In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt. In a medium bowl, combine the bananas, eggs, milk, sugar, and vanilla and whisk until smooth. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix with a wooden spoon until just combined. (There will be some small lumps in the batter.)

Place ½ tablespoon butter into the reserved skillet and heat it over medium-low heat. Scoop ¼ cup pancake batter onto one side of the skillet and spread lightly into a circle with the bottom of the measuring cup. Scoop out 2 more pancakes, spacing them evenly in the pan. Cook until bubbles begin to form on top and the bottoms are golden brown, about 2 minutes. Flip the pancakes and cook for another minute. Transfer them to a serving platter. Repeat with the remaining pancake batter, adjusting the heat so the pancakes brown evenly, and adding more butter to the pan as necessary.
Serve the pancakes warm, with the pineapple and pecans and more maple syrup.
